# Basic MCP server functionality tests
# This tests basic server tool functionality

# Set test environment
env MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT=10s

# Test basic mcpspy functionality
exec bash -c 'echo "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 1, \"method\": \"initialize\", \"params\": {\"protocolVersion\": \"2025-03-26\", \"capabilities\": {}}}" | mcpspy --pretty'
stdout '"jsonrpc": "2.0"'
stdout '"method": "initialize"'
stdout '"protocolVersion": "2025-03-26"'

# Test tools request
exec bash -c 'echo "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 2, \"method\": \"tools/list\", \"params\": {}}" | mcpspy --pretty'
stdout '"jsonrpc": "2.0"'
stdout '"method": "tools/list"'
